description: 微信公众号图文发布流程（v1.7.25：多种点击方式尝试 + 图片轮询加载 + 详细诊断）

steps.descript: 导航到微信公众号主页
点击登录按钮
等待登录完成
进入内容管理
点击草稿箱
点击新的创作

steps.value: const links = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('a')); const writeLink = links.find(a => (a.innerText||'').trim() === '写新文章'); if (writeLink) { writeLink.target = '_self'; writeLink.removeAttribute('target'); return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, found: true, href: writeLink.href }); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到 写新文章 链接（可能需要 hover 才显示）', linkCount: links.length, linkTexts: links.map(a => (a.innerText||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) });
steps.descript: 移除 写新文章 链接的 target=_blank（改为当前页跳转，避免新标签页导致 ctx.page 失效）
点击 写新文章（target 已改为 _self，在当前标签页打开编辑页）
等待跳转到编辑页（URL 含 appmsg_edit_v2）
等待编辑页加载（ProseMirror 初始化）

steps.value: const SELS = ['.weui-desktop-dialog', '.weui-desktop-modal', '[role="dialog"]', '.js_dialog', '.js_modal', '.weui-desktop-dialog__wrp', '.weui-desktop-modal__wrp', '[class*="modal"]', '[class*="dialog"]', '[class*="popup"]', '[class*="mask"]', '.tips_box', '.guide-popup', '.new-feature']; const BTNS_TEXT = ['我知道了', '知道了', '确定', '确认', '同意', '关闭', '取消', '暂不', '下次再说', '不再提示', '不再显示', '×', 'x', '关闭']; const BTNS_CLS = ['close', 'cancel', 'dismiss', 'js_close']; const dialogs = new Set(); for (const s of SELS) { document.querySelectorAll(s).forEach(d => dialogs.add(d)); } let closed = []; const allDialogInfo = []; for (const d of dialogs) { const r = d.getBoundingClientRect(); if (r.width <= 0 || r.height <= 0) continue; const cls = (d.className || '').slice(0, 80); const txt = (d.innerText || '').slice(0, 150).replace(/\s+/g, ' '); allDialogInfo.push({ cls, text: txt }); const btns = d.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], .weui-desktop-btn, .js_close, .close, .weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"]'); let btnClicked = false; for (const b of btns) { const t = (b.innerText || b.textContent || '').trim(); const c = (b.className || '').toLowerCase(); const isClose = BTNS_TEXT.some(k => t.includes(k)) || BTNS_CLS.some(k => c.includes(k)) || t === '×' || t === 'x'; if (isClose) { try { b.click(); closed.push(t || c.slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } if (!btnClicked) { const closeIcons = d.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-icon-close, i[class*="close"], [class*="close-btn"], [aria-label*="close"], [aria-label*="关闭"]'); for (const ic of closeIcons) { try { ic.click(); closed.push('icon:' + (ic.className || '').slice(0, 40)); btnClicked = true; break; } catch {} } } } return JSON.stringify({ dialogCount: allDialogInfo.length, dialogs: allDialogInfo, closedCount: closed.length, closed });
steps.descript: 关闭公告/引导/协议弹窗（覆盖 weui-desktop-dialog/modal/popup/mask 等，点击 我知道了/确定/关闭/×/取消）
等待弹窗关闭动画

steps.value: const pm = document.querySelectorAll('.ProseMirror'); const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const titleInput = document.querySelector('#title, input.js_title, textarea.js_title'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace, .edui-body-container, .ql-editor'); const layout = document.querySelector('.weui-desktop-layout__main'); const editor = document.querySelector('.appmsg_editor'); const info = { url: location.href, viewport: { w: window.innerWidth, h: window.innerHeight }, pmCount: pm.length, pmClasses: Array.from(pm).map(e => (e.className||'').slice(0,80)), titlePm: titlePm ? { rect: titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: titlePm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, bodyPm: bodyPm ? { rect: bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(), visible: bodyPm.offsetWidth > 0 } : null, titleInput: titleInput ? { tag: titleInput.tagName, id: titleInput.id, cls: (titleInput.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, ueditor: ueditor ? { tag: ueditor.tagName, id: ueditor.id, cls: (ueditor.className||'').slice(0,60) } : null, layout: layout ? layout.getBoundingClientRect() : null, editor: editor ? editor.getBoundingClientRect() : null }; return JSON.stringify(info);
steps.descript: 诊断编辑页布局（打印 URL/viewport/ProseMirror/title/ueditor 等元素位置，排查 Worker 浏览器布局差异）

steps.value:
const titlePm = document.querySelector('.ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"][data-placeholder="请在这里输入标题"]'); const titleTa = document.querySelector('#title'); const TITLE = ARG || ''; const result = { titlePm: !!titlePm, titleTa: !!titleTa, titleLen: TITLE.length }; if (titlePm) { titlePm.focus(); const r = titlePm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.titlePmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.titlePmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; titlePm.innerHTML = ''; document.execCommand('selectAll', false, null); document.execCommand('insertText', false, TITLE); if (titlePm.innerText.trim().length === 0) { titlePm.innerHTML = '

' + TITLE + '

'; titlePm.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertText', data: TITLE })); } result.titleFilled = true; result.actualText = titlePm.innerText.trim().slice(0, 50); } if (titleTa) { titleTa.value = TITLE; titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); titleTa.dispatchEvent(new Event('change', { bubbles: true })); result.titleTaFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 填写文章标题（evaluate_edit 直接 DOM API 填入，绕过 Playwright 可见性检查）
输入作者

steps.value: const bodyPm = document.querySelector('.view.rich_media_content .ProseMirror[contenteditable="true"]'); const ueditor = document.querySelector('#ueditor_replace'); const CONTENT = ARG || ''; const result = { bodyPm: !!bodyPm, ueditor: !!ueditor, contentLen: CONTENT.length }; if (bodyPm) { bodyPm.focus(); const r = bodyPm.getBoundingClientRect(); result.bodyPmRect = { x: Math.round(r.x), y: Math.round(r.y), w: Math.round(r.width), h: Math.round(r.height) }; result.bodyPmVisible = r.width > 0 && r.height > 0; bodyPm.innerHTML = ''; document.execCommand('selectAll', false, null); document.execCommand('insertHTML', false, CONTENT); if (bodyPm.innerText.trim().length === 0) { bodyPm.innerHTML = CONTENT; bodyPm.dispatchEvent(new InputEvent('input', { bubbles: true, inputType: 'insertFromPaste', data: CONTENT.slice(0, 100) })); } result.bodyFilled = true; result.actualLen = bodyPm.innerText.trim().length; } else if (ueditor) { ueditor.innerHTML = CONTENT; ueditor.dispatchEvent(new Event('input', { bubbles: true })); result.ueditorFilled = true; } return JSON.stringify(result);
steps.descript: 输入正文（evaluate_edit 直接 DOM API 填入，绕过 ProseMirror 可见性检查）
等待正文图片渲染完成（用于'从正文选择'封面）

steps.value: function simpleClick(el) { if (!el) return; const evt = new MouseEvent('click', { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window }); el.dispatchEvent(evt); el.click(); } function fullClick(el) { if (!el) return; const opts = { bubbles: true, cancelable: true, view: window }; try { el.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent('pointerdown', opts)); } catch(e) {} el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mousedown', opts)); try { el.dispatchEvent(new PointerEvent('pointerup', opts)); } catch(e) {} el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('mouseup', opts)); el.dispatchEvent(new MouseEvent('click', opts)); el.click(); } const fromContentBtn = document.querySelector('a.js_selectCoverFromContent'); if (!fromContentBtn) throw new Error('未找到 从正文选择 按钮'); fromContentBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); fullClick(fromContentBtn); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); const dialogs = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog')); const dialog = dialogs.find(d => (d.innerText || '').includes('选择图片') && (d.innerText || '').includes('正文') && d.offsetWidth > 0); if (!dialog) throw new Error('未弹出选择图片弹窗（dialogCount=' + dialogs.length + '）'); let imgSpans = []; for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) { imgSpans = Array.from(dialog.querySelectorAll('.appmsg_content_img_list .appmsg_content_img.cover, .appmsg_content_img_list .appmsg_content_img, .appmsg_content_img_list li, .appmsg_content_img_list [class*=img]')).filter(el => { const r = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return r.width > 0 || r.height > 0; }); if (imgSpans.length > 0) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1000)); } if (imgSpans.length === 0) { const diagHtml = dialog.innerHTML.slice(0, 2000); throw new Error('弹窗内无可选图片（轮询5次）。弹窗HTML: ' + diagHtml); } const imgSpan = imgSpans[0]; const li = imgSpan.closest('li') || imgSpan; const innerDiv = li.querySelector('div') || li; const rectBefore = imgSpan.getBoundingClientRect(); const diag = { imgSpanTag: imgSpan.tagName, imgSpanCls: (imgSpan.className||'').slice(0,80), imgSpanRect: { x: Math.round(rectBefore.x), y: Math.round(rectBefore.y), w: Math.round(rectBefore.width), h: Math.round(rectBefore.height) }, liTag: li.tagName, liCls: (li.className||'').slice(0,80), innerDivTag: innerDiv.tagName, innerDivCls: (innerDiv.className||'').slice(0,80), totalImgs: imgSpans.length }; imgSpan.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 300)); function getMask() { return imgSpan.parentElement && imgSpan.parentElement.querySelector('.card_mask_global, [class*=mask], [class*=selected]'); } function isSelected() { const m = getMask(); return m && (m.offsetWidth > 0 || m.offsetHeight > 0 || getComputedStyle(m).display !== 'none'); } const clickTargets = [imgSpan, innerDiv, li]; let selected = false; let clickAttempt = 0; for (const target of clickTargets) { if (!target) continue; clickAttempt++; simpleClick(target); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600)); selected = isSelected(); if (selected) break; fullClick(target); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 600)); selected = isSelected(); if (selected) break; } if (!selected) { for (const t of clickTargets) { if (!t) continue; simpleClick(t); } await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 800)); selected = isSelected(); } if (!selected) { const maskEl = getMask(); const maskDiag = maskEl ? { tag: maskEl.tagName, cls: (maskEl.className||'').slice(0,80), offsetW: maskEl.offsetWidth, offsetH: maskEl.offsetHeight, display: getComputedStyle(maskEl).display, visibility: getComputedStyle(maskEl).visibility } : null; throw new Error('图片未选中（尝试' + clickAttempt + '次点击）。diag=' + JSON.stringify(diag) + ' maskDiag=' + JSON.stringify(maskDiag)); } const allBtns = Array.from(dialog.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog__ft button')); const nextBtn = allBtns.find(b => (b.innerText||'').trim() === '下一步' && b.offsetWidth > 0 && !b.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')); if (!nextBtn) throw new Error('未找到可用的下一步按钮: ' + JSON.stringify(allBtns.map(b => ({text:(b.innerText||'').trim(), disabled:b.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled'), display:getComputedStyle(b).display})))); fullClick(nextBtn); await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 2000)); const dialogs2 = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('.weui-desktop-dialog')); const visibleD2 = dialogs2.filter(d => d.offsetWidth > 0); const diagState = visibleD2.map(d => ({ text: (d.innerText||'').trim().slice(0, 150), btns: Array.from(d.querySelectorAll('button')).filter(b => b.offsetWidth > 0).map(b => ({ t: (b.innerText||'').trim(), disabled: b.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled') })) })); let finishBtn = null; for (const d of visibleD2) { const btn = Array.from(d.querySelectorAll('button')).find(b => (b.innerText||'').trim() === '完成' && b.offsetWidth > 0); if (btn) { finishBtn = btn; break; } } let finishClicked = false; if (finishBtn) { for (let i = 0; i < 10; i++) { if (!finishBtn.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')) break; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 500)); } if (finishBtn.classList.contains('weui-desktop-btn_disabled')) { throw new Error('完成按钮仍禁用（可能需裁剪操作）: ' + JSON.stringify(diagState)); } fullClick(finishBtn); finishClicked = true; await new Promise(r => setTimeout(r, 1500)); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, selectedCount: imgSpans.length, nextClicked: true, finishClicked, diag, dialogStateAfterNext: diagState });
steps.descript: 从正文选择封面（多种点击方式：simpleClick+fullClick 轮流尝试 span/li/innerDiv，失败时输出详细诊断）
等待封面设置生效

steps.value: const coverArea = document.querySelector('#js_cover_area'); if (!coverArea) throw new Error('封面区域 #js_cover_area 不存在'); const preview = coverArea.querySelector('.js_cover_preview_new'); const fileIdInput = coverArea.querySelector('input.js_file_id'); const cdnUrlInput = coverArea.querySelector('input.js_cdn_url'); const bgImg = preview && preview.style.backgroundImage; const result = { previewDisplay: preview ? preview.style.display : null, previewBg: bgImg ? bgImg.slice(0, 200) : null, fileId: fileIdInput ? fileIdInput.value : null, cdnUrl: cdnUrlInput ? (cdnUrlInput.value || '').slice(0, 150) : null }; const coverSet = preview && preview.style.display !== 'none' && bgImg && bgImg !== 'url("")' && bgImg !== 'url()' && (fileIdInput && fileIdInput.value); if (!coverSet) { throw new Error('封面未设置成功: ' + JSON.stringify(result)); } return JSON.stringify({ ok: true, coverSet: true, fileId: result.fileId, cdnUrl: result.cdnUrl });
steps.descript: 验证封面是否设置成功（检查 preview 显示 + background-image + file_id 有值）

branch_steps.selector: //div[text()="声明原创成功后将获得平台著作权保护，并有可能得到推荐"]

steps.descript: 声明原创分支

steps.value: const btns = Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('button, .weui-desktop-btn, a.weui-desktop-btn, span.weui-desktop-btn')); const publishBtn = btns.find(b => { const t = (b.innerText||'').trim(); return t === '发表' || t === '无需声明并发表' || t === '群发'; }); if (!publishBtn) return JSON.stringify({ ok: false, reason: '未找到发表按钮', buttonTexts: btns.map(b => (b.innerText||'').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) }); publishBtn.scrollIntoView({ block: 'center' }); return new Promise(r => setTimeout(() => { publishBtn.click(); r(JSON.stringify({ ok: true, clicked: (publishBtn.innerText||'').trim(), rect: publishBtn.getBoundingClientRect() })); }, 500));
steps.descript: 点击发表（evaluate_edit: scrollIntoView + click，解决按钮在视口外 Playwright click 失效问题）
等待发表完成

steps.value: const url = window.location.href; const stillOnEditPage = url.includes('appmsg_edit_v2'); const errorEls = document.querySelectorAll('.js_error_msg, .weui-desktop-toast--warn, .frm_msg.fail, .js_cover_error, .weui-desktop-toast--error, .weui-desktop-toast__content'); const errors = Array.from(errorEls).map(e => (e.innerText || e.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 3); if (stillOnEditPage) { throw new Error('发表后 URL 仍为编辑页（appmsg_edit_v2），发表动作未触发。可能原因：封面图未设置/表单验证失败。错误提示: ' + (errors.join('; ') || '无')); } return url;
steps.descript: 验证发表成功（URL 必须跳转离开编辑页，否则抛错；检测 .js_error_msg/.weui-desktop-toast--warn/.js_cover_error 等错误提示）
